book_order_permuted.interpretation: availability-only control; it does not enumerate candidate ranks because the control question is whether previous material still contains the chosen content under the perturbation

literal_tape_shuffled.interpretation: raw literal-payload coding is insensitive to tape order; shuffled replay only tests whether the existing innovation order is itself needed for exact replay

previous_material_reversed_order.interpretation: availability-only control; it does not enumerate candidate ranks because the control question is whether previous material still contains the chosen content under the perturbation

previous_material_shuffled_digits.interpretation: availability-only control; it does not enumerate candidate ranks because the control question is whether previous material still contains the chosen content under the perturbation

decision.next_blocker: origin/content remains external: composition residual, copy chunk content, literal innovation, and seed payload
